specialSelectors.label: Unknown endpoint
specialSelectors.description: Endpoints outside the supported local MPM assignment or nearest to an atlas label without a project region entity.

specialSelectors.label: Ambiguous endpoint
specialSelectors.description: Endpoints whose two nearest distinct MPM labels fall within the frozen ambiguity margin.

presets.label: Extrastriate cortex
presets.description: Contours with either geometric endpoint assigned within the displayed early and extrastriate visual-region set.

presets.label: Ventral visual stream
presets.description: Contours with either geometric endpoint assigned within the displayed ventral visual-region set.

presets.label: Dorsal visual stream
presets.description: Contours with either geometric endpoint assigned within the displayed dorsal visual-region set.

presets.label: Integrated ventral–dorsal streams
presets.description: Contours with one geometric endpoint in the displayed ventral set and the other in the displayed dorsal set, independent of stored endpoint order.
